column1: TODAY | A heat advisory is back today for a heat index of around 110F at times during the afternoon. Take plenty of breaks if working outside and remember to hydrate.
THANK YOU DENIS for all your time and efforts for all the information you provide. We appreciate YOU!

Thank you for working these insane hours. My home base is the west coast of Florida, but I'm currently on the "other side of the pond". Your updates popping up on my time zone re the upcoming weekend/early next week weather event, while worrying, are very helpful and appreciated. thank you...
Hopefully employers give employees who work outdoors cooking breaks.
a certain somebody made it so outdoor workers arent legally required to take breaks anymore 😡
They are going to be cooking alright! 😛 🥵 They should be given the day off!
The cooler weather that comes with a tropical storm is looking pretty nice right now

Moving my daughter at UF 🐊

we were just in New York as well, and currently in Virginia. We will be making our way back to Florida tomorrow with our rv in tow. We shall see what happens on the drive back 😂
yes
